headlines.headline: Dralol Computing recalls products in renewable storage line due to quality concerns

sentiment.reasoning: A product recall indicates immediate operational costs and potential reputational damage that may persist as the company addresses quality control issues.

headlines.headline: Halven Investments reports 15% decline in operating income

sentiment.reasoning: A significant decline in operating income directly impacts profitability and investor sentiment in the short term.

headlines.headline: Halven Investments sees 8% margin improvement in latest quarter

sentiment.reasoning: Margin improvement suggests better operational efficiency which typically has a positive and lasting effect on financial performance.

headlines.headline: Halven Investments reports 5% increase in customer acquisition

sentiment.reasoning: An increase in customer acquisition is a positive growth indicator that often compounds over time as these customers contribute to revenue.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
